en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?
B: I want to buy a cup.
A: Hello, what are you looking for?
B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: bayi cu copu, cyu mamu tbayi?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?
B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?
A: Do you sell betel nut?
B: No, we don't sell betel nut.
A: I want to buy rice.
B: How many packs do you want to buy?
A: Give me three packs.
A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.
B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.
A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.
B: There's only one bottle left.
A: Go buy me eggs.
B: How many pounds do you want to buy?
A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy two catties.
A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: nyu mhra tugan nhun, siy misu bi’iy kwara.
en: B: There are three left, you can have them all!
A: How much is this bag of rice?
B: $200 for a pack.

ab: kwara pila ga pusan utux, pusan lga yaca la.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.

ab: cahay ga m’esu pgan magan pila.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: twangay mu bayi cikah, siy tna’iy utux kbhun pila.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: kwara pila ga magan kbhun mpu.
en: A:All $510.

ab: siy cu galiy magan kbhun pila la ki?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: kwani ga hmet ci la, ana su mhway cikah?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: ini ga, kwani ga waya mhway ci la.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: galun mu utux cnabu pang kiyay hani.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: pang kiyay hani ga tiyun pila, smoya su bayi binah nya loyi?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
